creator: volf@oasis.IAEhv.nl
text:
The pnmtopng has been upgraded from version 2.37.2 to 2.37.3. The old
distfile has been removed from the master site. 

Please, apply the following patch to the port.

Thanks,

             Frank

BTW: I'm the maintainer of this port


Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home2/CVS/ports/graphics/pnmtopng/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.10
diff -u -r1.10 Makefile
--- Makefile	1999/08/25 06:14:41	1.10
+++ Makefile	1999/10/07 17:55:34
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/graphics/pnmtopng/Makefile,v 1.10 1999/08/25 06:14:41 obrien Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=       pnmtopng-2.37.2
+DISTNAME=       pnmtopng-2.37.3
 CATEGORIES=     graphics
 MASTER_SITES=   ftp://swrinde.nde.swri.edu/pub/png/applications/
 
Index: files/md5
===================================================================
RCS file: /home2/CVS/ports/graphics/pnmtopng/files/md5,v
retrieving revision 1.3
diff -u -r1.3 md5
--- md5	1999/04/02 03:19:52	1.3
+++ md5	1999/10/07 17:57:39
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pnmtopng-2.37.2.tar.gz) = b143abb42009c1ec84fb9edda483e3ba
+MD5 (pnmtopng-2.37.3.tar.gz) = 59cb2ca87d579b566debadc4033526f9
